title: Test serialize_within_feature_tree scheduler behaviour
description: Add five new tests to `tests/test_scheduler_core.py` covering the new `serialize_within_feature_tree` flag, plus one config-loading test in `tests/test_config.py`. Tests: (1) flag off — two same-tree mutating beads with non-overlapping `expected_files` are both dispatched; (2) flag on — same setup, second bead deferred; (3) flag on, cross-feature-tree — both dispatched; (4) flag on, non-mutating pair (planner + review in same tree) — no conflict from the new rule; (5) flag on, deferral reason — deferred bead's block reason matches `"worktree serialization enabled — waiting on in-progress <bead_id>"`. Config test: load a YAML with no `scheduler` block and assert `config.scheduler.serialize_within_feature_tree is False`.
acceptance_criteria: All five scheduler behavioural tests pass
Config-loading test asserts absent `scheduler` block resolves to `False`
uv run pytest tests/ -n auto -q passes
